stemHtml: On a SID requiring 6000 ft within 10 NM, your aircraft cannot meet this due to performance. What should you do?

options.a: Inform ATC you are UNABLE to comply; expect amended instructions.
options.b: Continue climbing despite not meeting the SID criteria.
options.c: Ignore the SID and follow a different route.
options.d: Inform ATC you are UNABLE; ATC will only note it.
